info.title: Devic.ai Public API
info.description: Devic.ai is an AI platform that allows you to create, manage, and use AI agents for various tasks.
info.x-summary: Public API for interacting with Devic.ai platform

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Group agents, assistants, documents and costs into projects

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Knowledge base documents: create, version, attach and index markdown content for RAG

tags.name: Document Folders
tags.description: Organise knowledge base documents into folders and attach them in bulk

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Upload files and obtain shareable download URLs to attach to messages

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Endpoints related to AI agents and their operations

tags.name: Assistants
tags.description: Endpoints for interacting with assistants and their specializations

tags.name: Tool Servers
tags.description: Endpoints for managing tool servers and their tool definitions

createdByUserUID.description: UID of the user that created the project

identifier.description: Unique identifier (lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, e.g. "my-project-1")

projectId.description: Project ID the document is scoped to

folderId.description: Folder ID the document is filed in

parentDocumentId.description: Parent document ID (for subdocuments referenced via @ mentions)

createdByUserUID.description: UID of the user that created the document

total.description: Total number of documents matching the query

markdownContent.description: Markdown content to store and index for RAG

projectId.description: Optional project ID to scope the document

parentDocumentId.description: Optional parent document ID (for subdocuments referenced via @ mentions)

folderId.description: Optional folder ID to file the document

markdownContent.description: Markdown content (creates a new version when it changes)

parentDocumentId.description: Parent document ID (send null to unset)

targetType.description: Type of entity to attach the document to

targetId.description: ID of the agent or assistant

isActive.description: Whether this is the active version

projectId.description: Project ID the folder is scoped to

parentFolderId.description: Parent folder ID (send null to unset)

downloadUrl.description: Shareable URL to download the uploaded file

ApprovalStatus.description: Status of an execution awaiting approval

name.description: Name of the tool or function (for tool messages)

tool_call_id.description: Unique identifier for the tool call

agentId.description: Unique identifier for the associated agent

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the thread was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the thread was last updated

metadata.description: Custom metadata associated with the thread

cost.description: Total cost accumulated by this thread

metadata.description: Custom metadata to associate with the thread

async.description: Whether to execute the thread asynchronously

comment.description: Optional comment about the approval decision

evaluatorModel.description: Identifier for the model used to evaluate the agent

enabled.description: Whether automatic evaluation is enabled for this agent

feedback.description: Detailed feedback or explanation of the evaluation

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the evaluation was created

totalCost.description: Total cost accumulated by the agent

identifier.description: Unique identifier for the assistant specialization

description.description: Detailed description of what the specialization does

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the specialization was created

availableToolsGroupsUids.description: Tool group UIDs the assistant can use

enabledTools.description: Explicit subset of enabled tool names

availableSkillIds.description: Skill IDs the assistant can use

subagentsIds.description: Subagent IDs the assistant can invoke

maxToolResponseInputTokens.description: Maximum input tokens for tool responses

chatUid.description: Unique identifier for the chat session

assistantIdentifier.description: Identifier for the assistant specialization used

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat was created

metadata.description: Custom metadata associated with the chat

messages.description: Messages to process, usually including the latest user message

chatUid.description: Optional chat UID to continue an existing conversation

fromDate.description: Start date for filtering chat histories

toDate.description: End date for filtering chat histories

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the health status was checked

availableToolsGroupsUids.description: Tool group UIDs the agent can use

enabledTools.description: Explicit subset of enabled tool names

codeSnippetIds.description: Code snippet IDs available to the agent

availableSkillIds.description: Skill IDs the agent can mount

subagentsIds.description: Subagent IDs the agent can invoke

maxChatMessages.description: Maximum number of chat messages to include in context

maxToolResponseInputTokens.description: Maximum input tokens for tool responses

executionFrequencyIntervalMs.description: Timeframe in milliseconds for execution frequency limit

strict.description: Whether the tool uses strict mode

bodyPropertyKey.description: Body property key for request body

isFormDataBody.description: Whether the body is form data

bodyJsonTemplate.description: JSON body template for advanced mode

responsePostProcessingTemplate.description: JS expression template for response post-processing

url.description: Base URL for the tool server API

enabled.description: Whether the tool server is enabled

mcpType.description: Whether this is an MCP type server

imageUrl.description: Image URL for the tool server

toolServerDefinitionId.description: Tool server definition ID to link to an existing definition

url.description: Base URL for the tool server API

enabled.description: Whether the tool server is enabled

imageUrl.description: Image URL for the tool server

enabled.description: Whether the tool server is enabled

mcpType.description: Whether this is an MCP type server

isFormDataBody.description: Whether the body is form data

parameters.description: Parameters object to pass to the tool

success.description: Whether the tool call was successful

error.description: Error message if the call failed

get.description: Lists the projects the authenticated client has access to, with optional pagination.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Include archived projects (default: false)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Creates a new project.

get.description: Retrieves a single project by its ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

patch.description: Updates a project. Supports partial updates.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

delete.description: Archives a project (soft delete). Archived projects can be listed with archived=true.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

get.description: Returns a summary of the project's usage statistics (agents, assistants, documents, conversations).

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

get.description: Lists the agent execution threads associated with the project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

200.description: Agent threads associated with the project

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

get.description: Lists the assistant conversations associated with the project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

200.description: Assistant conversations associated with the project

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

get.summary: Get daily costs for a project
get.description: Returns the daily cost breakdown for the project over an optional date range.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Filter costs by tenant

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

get.summary: Get monthly costs for a project
get.description: Returns the monthly cost breakdown for the project over an optional month range.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: startMonth
parameters.description: Start month (YYYY-MM)

parameters.name: endMonth
parameters.description: End month (YYYY-MM)

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Filter costs by tenant

403.description: Forbidden - No access to this project

get.description: Lists knowledge base documents for the authenticated client, with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter by project ID

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status

parameters.name: fileType
parameters.description: Filter by file type

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search in name and content

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Filter by folder ID. Use "none" to return documents without a folder

parameters.name: parentOnly
parameters.description: When true, only return root documents (no parent)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Creates a markdown document and indexes its content for RAG. Optionally scope it to a project and/or file it inside a folder.

get.description: Returns the graph of links between documents (built from @ mentions), optionally scoped to a project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Scope the graph to a project

schema.description: Nodes and edges describing links between documents

get.description: Retrieves a single document, including its current markdown content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

patch.description: Updates a document. Changing the markdown content creates a new version and re-indexes the document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

delete.description: Deletes a document and removes it from the knowledge index.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

get.description: Lists all stored versions for a document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

get.description: Retrieves a specific version of a document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version number

post.summary: Revert a document to a previous version
post.description: Reverts a document to a previous version, creating a new active version with that content and re-indexing it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Target version number

get.description: Lists the subdocuments referenced from a document via @ mentions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

get.description: Returns which agents and assistants currently reference this document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

schema.description: Agents and assistants that reference the document

post.summary: Attach a document to an agent or assistant
post.description: Attaches a document to an agent or assistant so it becomes part of its RAG knowledge.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

post.summary: Detach a document from an agent or assistant
post.description: Detaches a document from an agent or assistant.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID

get.description: Lists document folders for the authenticated client, optionally scoped to a project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter by project ID

post.description: Creates a document folder to organise knowledge base documents.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Folder ID

delete.description: Deletes a folder. Pass deleteDocuments=true to also delete the documents it contains.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Folder ID

parameters.name: deleteDocuments
parameters.description: When true, also delete the documents contained in the folder

post.summary: Attach a folder to an agent or assistant
post.description: Attaches a folder and all the documents it contains to an agent or assistant.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Folder ID

post.summary: Detach a folder from an agent or assistant
post.description: Detaches a folder from an agent or assistant.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Folder ID

post.description: Uploads a file and returns a shareable download URL. Supports images, documents, audio and video up to 25MB. The returned downloadUrl can be included in the files array when sending a message to an assistant or agent.

post.summary: Create a new thread for an agent
post.description: Creates a new execution thread for the specified agent. Threads allow you to run agent tasks, manage their state, and track associated costs.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent for which to create the thread

requestBody.description: Payload to create a new thread

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.description: Retrieves a list of execution threads associated with the specified agent. This can be used for monitoring and debugging purposes.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose threads should be listed

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter threads by status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of threads to return (pagination)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of threads to skip (pagination offset)

200.description: List of threads for the specified agent

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific thread, including its status, metadata, and message history.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to retrieve

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

patch.description: Updates the status or metadata of a specific thread. This can be used to pause, resume, or modify thread metadata.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to update

requestBody.description: Fields to update in the thread

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Approves or rejects a thread execution that is awaiting approval. This is part of the human-in-the-loop workflow.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread awaiting approval

404.description: Thread not found or not awaiting approval

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Marks a thread as completed. This can be used to signal the end of an execution, especially in manual or custom workflows.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to complete

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Pauses an ongoing thread. This can be useful to temporarily stop execution while waiting for external events.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to pause

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Resumes a previously paused thread and continues its execution.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to resume

404.description: Thread not found or not paused

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Triggers an evaluation run for the specified thread. This uses the evaluation configuration defined for the associated agent.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread to evaluate

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get latest evaluation for a thread
get.description: Retrieves the most recent evaluation result for the specified thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread whose latest evaluation should be retrieved

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.description: Retrieves all evaluations associated with the specified thread, ordered by creation date.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread whose evaluations should be listed

200.description: List of evaluations for the thread

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get a specific evaluation by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific evaluation, including score and feedback.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: UUID of the thread associated with the evaluation

parameters.name: evaluationId
parameters.description: UUID of the evaluation to retrieve

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get evaluation configuration for an agent
get.description: Retrieves the evaluation configuration associated with the specified agent.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose evaluation config should be retrieved

404.description: Agent not found or evaluation config not set

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

put.summary: Update evaluation configuration for an agent
put.description: Creates or updates the evaluation configuration for the specified agent.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose evaluation config should be updated

requestBody.description: New evaluation configuration for the agent

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get daily cost breakdown for an agent
get.description: Retrieves daily cost entries for the specified agent over a configurable time range.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose daily costs should be retrieved

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to include in the cost breakdown

200.description: Daily cost breakdown for the specified agent

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get monthly cost breakdown for an agent
get.description: Retrieves monthly cost entries for the specified agent over a configurable time range.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose monthly costs should be retrieved

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of months to include in the cost breakdown

200.description: Monthly cost breakdown for the specified agent

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get cost summary for an agent
get.description: Retrieves a summary of the total cost for the specified agent, including optional breakdown by category.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: UUID of the agent whose cost summary should be retrieved

200.description: Cost summary for the specified agent

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.description: Retrieves all available assistant specializations that you can interact with via the API.

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Creates a new assistant with the provided configuration.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific assistant specialization.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of the assistant specialization to retrieve

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

patch.description: Updates an existing assistant with the provided data. Supports partial updates.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the assistant to update

delete.description: Deletes an assistant and its associated resources (RAG documents, internal API key).

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the assistant to delete

post.summary: Process a message with an assistant specialization
post.description: Sends messages to the specified assistant specialization and returns its response. You can provide a chatUid to continue an existing conversation.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of the assistant specialization to use

requestBody.description: Messages and optional chat context for the assistant

200.description: Assistant response and updated chat context

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get chat history by chat UID
get.description: Retrieves the full message history for a specific chat with an assistant specialization.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of the assistant specialization

parameters.name: chatUid
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the chat session

404.description: Chat or assistant specialization not found

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.summary: List chat histories for a specific assistant specialization
get.description: Retrieves chat histories associated with a particular assistant specialization.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of the assistant specialization

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of chat histories to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of chat histories to skip (pagination offset)

200.description: List of chat histories for the assistant specialization

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

post.description: Retrieves chat histories across all assistant specializations, with support for filtering by date range, metadata, and assistant identifier.

200.description: List of chat histories matching the filter

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the health status of the API. Useful for monitoring and uptime checks.

500.description: API is unhealthy or experiencing issues

get.description: Retrieves a specific markdown document by its filename and returns it rendered as HTML.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Name of the markdown file (without extension)

get.description: Retrieves the raw markdown content of a specific document by its filename.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Name of the markdown file (without extension)

get.description: Retrieves an index of available markdown documentation files with metadata such as title and summary.
Retrieves a paginated list of all agents for the authenticated client.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived status

post.description: Creates a new agent with the provided configuration, including assistant specialization for tools and behavior.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific agent.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent

patch.description: Updates an existing agent with the provided data. Supports partial updates.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent to update

delete.description: Deletes an agent. Note: This does not delete associated threads.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent to delete

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all tool servers for the authenticated client.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

post.description: Creates a new tool server. If toolDefinitions array is provided, a new tool server definition will be created and linked automatically.

get.description: Retrieves a specific tool server by its ID, including its tool definition.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

patch.description: Updates the tool server information. If toolDefinitions array is provided, it will update (or create) the tool server definition with the new tools.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

delete.description: Deletes a tool server. Note: This does not delete the associated tool server definition.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

get.summary: Get all tools in a tool server
get.description: Retrieves all tool definitions from a tool server definition.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

post.summary: Add a tool to a tool server
post.description: Adds a new tool definition to the tool server. If the tool server does not have a definition, one will be created.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

400.description: Invalid tool data or tool name already exists

get.summary: Get a specific tool by name
get.description: Retrieves a specific tool definition by its function name.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: The function name of the tool

404.description: Tool server or tool not found

patch.description: Updates a specific tool definition identified by its function name.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: The function name of the tool to update

404.description: Tool server or tool not found

delete.description: Removes a specific tool definition from the tool server definition.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: The function name of the tool to delete

404.description: Tool server or tool not found

post.description: Executes a tool call with the provided parameters and returns the result. This is useful for testing and debugging tool configurations.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: The function name of the tool to test

404.description: Tool server or tool not found

get.description: Retrieves the full tool server definition for a tool server.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

404.description: Tool server or definition not found

patch.description: Updates the tool server definition (name, description, and/or tools).

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server

404.description: Tool server or definition not found

post.description: Creates a copy of the tool server and its definition. The cloned server will have '(Copy)' appended to its name.

parameters.name: toolServerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the tool server to clone
